migration.holdingPageQuestion: Yog lub website muaj neeg siv ntau, puas tuaj yeem teeb ib nplooj ntawv tog thaum hloov chaw?
migration.specialRequirementsQuestion: Puas muaj lub website no muaj cov kev xav tau tshwj xeeb xws li PHP Version / Modules?
migration.domainRegistryInfo: Cov Ntaub Ntawv Sau Npe Domain
migration.transferDomainQuestion: Koj puas xav kom peb pab koj hloov kev sau npe domain npe?
migration.updateNameserversQuestion: Koj puas xav kom peb hloov cov nameserver tamsim peb ua tiav kev hloov cov ntaub ntawv?
migration.note1: Kev ua tiav daim ntawv no yuav qhib ib daim ntawv tshiab rau peb lub chav pab cuam pib koj kev hloov chaw.
migration.note2: Thov muab cov ntaub ntawv tiav thiab raug kom zam kev lig.
migration.note3: Kev hloov chaw ib txwm ua tiav hauv 48 txog 72 teev.
migration.note4: Tus account hosting qub yuav tsum online thiab nkag tau thaum peb ua kev hloov chaw.
migration.note5: Thov txhob hloov pauv koj lub website thaum peb ua kev hloov chaw.
